## LibraryData.checkForCollisionIds() function

Checks for duplicate collection IDs across multiple sources.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function checkForCollisionIds<TCollectionId extends string>(collectionSets: ReadonlyArray<ICollectionSet<TCollectionId>>): Result<true>;
```
